goal: Task type + status/priority/complexity enums + invariants tests
acceptance: core/domain/task/types.ts экспортирует Task, TaskStatus, TaskPriority, TaskComplexity (TS literal unions, не enum)
tests/domain/task/ покрывают status transitions + priority validation
notes: Pure domain — no Math.random(), no new Date() inline, no I/O. AGENTS.md § 5 + § 9 anti-patterns hard.
